title: Lesson 61: Past Tense: When the line and the dot meet
concepts: We've covered the two ways to talk about the past. Ongoing things - the line in the past, and single moments - the dot in the past. Often we need to use them both in the same sentence.

sentences.english: I was cooking when the phone rang
I was cooking when the phone rang

sentences.spanish: Hablaba por teléfono cuando María llegó
sentences.english: I was speaking on the phone when Maria arrived

sentences.spanish: Me parecia bien pero cuando lo vi no me gustó
sentences.english: It seemed good to me but when I saw it I didn't like it
